---
name: Bug report
about: Report a crash, incorrect behaviour, or unexpected output
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: GetGabed
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened. Include any error messages or log output.

## Screenshots / recordings
If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording to help explain the problem.

## Environment

| | |
|---|---|
| OS | Windows 10 / 11 |
| App version | e.g. v0.8.0 |
| .NET version | e.g. 8.0 (only relevant if running from source) |

## Additional context
Any other context about the problem (e.g. clipboard contents type, hotkey conflicts, startup behaviour).
